description: Traefik Labs provides cloud-native traffic management and API platform products including the open-source Traefik Proxy and the commercial Traefik Hub for API gateway, API management, and AI/MCP gateway use cases. Its products are deployed by operators to expose and govern their own APIs and services.
summary: Traefik.io exposes documented HTTP integration surfaces for Traefik Proxy’s API/dashboard and for Traefik Hub-managed APIs, plus MCP servers fronted by Traefik Hub’s MCP Gateway; no public GraphQL API or standalone developer CLI surface was found in Traefik-owned docs.

surfaces.name: Traefik Hub MCP Gateway-protected MCP servers
